rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Processes Executing with Unusual Command Lines (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Processes Executing with Unusual Command Lines (RedCanary Threat Detection
  Report)
id: 23aafdd3-8476-49a0-8377-54d26bf7847f
status: experimental
description: "Detects non-powershell.exe processes executing with command lines that\
  \ are usually \nassociated with powershell. This is an example for demonstration\
  \ purposes only. \nPart of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/rename-system-utilities/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1036.003
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - iex
    - invoke-expression
  filter_pwsh:
    Image|endswith: \powershell.exe
  condition: selection and not filter_pwsh
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
